# Leaky Abstractions

> A YouTube channel and blog exploring software engineering through animation and deep dives.

## Repository

This is the source repository for all Leaky Abstractions video and blog content.

- Repo: https://github.com/mrbandler/videos
- Channel: Leaky Abstractions

## Content

Each episode includes animated scenes (Motion Canvas), a companion blog post, video script, YouTube description, and captions. Episodes may be standalone or part of a series.

## Per-Page Context

Individual blog pages include a `<script type="text/llms.txt">` block in the HTML head with a summary of that page's content.
